description: 50 complex mixed-intent queries for evaluating decompose_with_zeroshot. Each case defines quality criteria the decomposition must satisfy.

quality_axes.route_validity: Every sub-task route must be 'sql' or 'text' (never 'hybrid' or other).
quality_axes.atomicity: Each sub-task should address a single intent; no sub-task should mix sql+text signals.
quality_axes.coverage: The union of sub-task queries must address all key concepts in the original query.
quality_axes.no_raw_sql: sub_query fields must be natural-language questions, not raw SQL statements.
quality_axes.count_ok: Number of sub-tasks must be between min_subtasks and max_subtasks.

test_cases.query: How many orders were placed last month and what does the return policy document say about eligible items?
test_cases.description: Two clean intents: a COUNT aggregation and a policy document lookup.

test_cases.query: What is the total revenue by region for Q3 2023 and can you summarize the regional expansion strategy from the business plan?
test_cases.description: SUM aggregation by region (SQL) + summarization of a strategy document (text).

test_cases.query: Count active subscriptions by pricing tier and explain the upgrade process described in the user guide.
test_cases.description: COUNT with GROUP BY (SQL) + procedure explanation from a document (text).

test_cases.query: Which products have the highest profit margin and what does the procurement policy document say about sole-source vendors?
test_cases.description: Ranking query (SQL) + policy document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: How many employees had overtime hours last quarter and what does the overtime compensation policy specify about weekend rates?
test_cases.description: Overtime COUNT (SQL) + compensation policy details (text).

test_cases.query: Show the average transaction value by sales channel and summarize the go-to-market strategy described in the Q4 planning document, then also list the top five customers by lifetime value.
test_cases.description: Three intents: AVG by channel (SQL), document summary (text), and TOP-N customer query (SQL). Tests 3-way split.

test_cases.query: How many support tickets were escalated to tier-2 last week and what are the escalation guidelines described in the SLA document?
test_cases.description: COUNT with filter (SQL) + SLA document retrieval (text).

test_cases.query: What percentage of new users converted to paid plans in Q2 and what does the onboarding guide say about the activation checklist?
test_cases.description: Conversion rate calculation (SQL) + onboarding document retrieval (text).

test_cases.query: Which five branches had the lowest net sales last year and what turnaround strategies does the operations manual recommend for underperforming locations?
test_cases.description: BOTTOM-N ranking (SQL) + strategy document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: How many new hires joined each department this year, what does the HR policy say about probation periods, and which departments had the highest attrition rate last year?
test_cases.description: Three intents: headcount by department (SQL), HR policy lookup (text), attrition ranking (SQL). Tests clean 3-way split.

test_cases.query: How many invoices exceeded the purchase order limit last quarter and what does the financial compliance policy say about pre-approval thresholds?
test_cases.description: COUNT with threshold filter (SQL) + financial policy document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What was the month-over-month growth in API calls over the past year and what does the system architecture document say about rate limiting?
test_cases.description: Time-series growth calculation (SQL) + architecture document retrieval (text).

test_cases.query: How many vendor contracts were signed per country this year and what does the master service agreement template say about governing law clauses?
test_cases.description: COUNT grouped by country (SQL) + MSA template document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What is the average session duration for mobile users versus desktop users and what best practices does the UX research report recommend for improving mobile engagement?
test_cases.description: AVG grouped by device type (SQL) + UX research document retrieval (text).

test_cases.query: Which customers have more than 3 open support tickets, what does the customer success playbook say about escalation procedures, and what is the average ticket resolution time per product category?
test_cases.description: Three intents: filtered customer list (SQL), playbook document lookup (text), AVG by category (SQL). Tests 3-way split with two distinct SQL operations.

test_cases.query: How many units of SKU-9812 are currently in stock across all warehouses and what does the product specification sheet say about storage temperature requirements?
test_cases.description: Inventory SUM across locations (SQL) + product specification document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: Which departments exceeded their Q2 budget and what does the financial governance policy say about mandatory board approval for budget overruns?
test_cases.description: Filter against budget threshold (SQL) + financial governance policy lookup (text).

test_cases.query: How many users opted out of email marketing last month and what does the privacy policy say about the right to withdraw consent?
test_cases.description: Opt-out COUNT (SQL) + privacy policy document retrieval (text). Tests GDPR-adjacent domain.

test_cases.query: What are the top 5 most frequent error codes returned by the payment gateway in the last 7 days and what does the integration guide say about handling those error codes gracefully?
test_cases.description: TOP-N frequency ranking (SQL) + integration guide document lookup (text). The phrase 'those error codes' intentionally links both intents.

test_cases.query: What was the total headcount reduction in Q3, what does the restructuring announcement say about severance packages, and which departments maintained full staffing levels throughout the year?
test_cases.description: Three intents: SUM reduction (SQL), restructuring document lookup (text), staffing filter (SQL). Tests 3-way split in a sensitive HR context.

test_cases.query: Which marketing campaigns generated the most leads last quarter and what does the brand guidelines document say about approved messaging channels?
test_cases.description: Campaign lead ranking (SQL) + brand guidelines document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What is the average NPS score by customer tier this quarter and what does the customer experience strategy document say about improving detractor outcomes?
test_cases.description: AVG grouped by customer tier (SQL) + customer experience strategy document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What was the refund rate for each product category in Q1 and what does the returns policy document specify about the conditions for a full refund?
test_cases.description: Refund rate by category (SQL) + returns policy document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: How has the monthly churn rate changed for each subscription tier over the past year and what does the retention strategy guide recommend for reducing voluntary churn?
test_cases.description: Time-series churn rate by tier (SQL) + retention strategy document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: How many leads were generated per acquisition channel last month, what does the sales playbook describe about lead qualification criteria, and what was the lead-to-opportunity conversion rate by channel?
test_cases.description: Three intents: lead count by channel (SQL), sales playbook document lookup (text), conversion rate by channel (SQL). Tests 3-way split.

test_cases.query: How many shipments were delivered late last month and what does the carrier SLA document specify about penalty clauses for late delivery?
test_cases.description: Late delivery COUNT (SQL) + carrier SLA document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: Which ten products had the highest unit sales volume this quarter and what does the product roadmap document describe about planned enhancements for those product lines?
test_cases.description: TOP-10 ranking by unit sales (SQL) + product roadmap document lookup (text). The phrase 'those product lines' intentionally cross-references both intents.

test_cases.query: What fraction of employees completed the mandatory compliance training this year, what does the L&D policy document say about training completion deadlines, and which departments have the lowest completion rates?
test_cases.description: Three intents: completion rate (SQL), L&D policy document lookup (text), department ranking (SQL). Tests 3-way split in an HR context.

test_cases.query: How many software licenses are currently unassigned in the asset management system and what does the software procurement policy say about license utilization thresholds?
test_cases.description: Unassigned license COUNT (SQL) + software procurement policy document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: How many P1 incidents were opened and resolved each month this year and what does the incident response playbook describe about post-mortem requirements for P1 events?
test_cases.description: Monthly P1 incident COUNT (SQL) + incident response playbook document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What was the total revenue generated through each partner channel last quarter and what does the channel partner agreement document specify about revenue sharing arrangements?
test_cases.description: Revenue aggregation by partner channel (SQL) + channel partner agreement document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: How many bugs were logged per severity level in the last sprint and what does the quality assurance policy document define as the acceptable defect density threshold?
test_cases.description: Bug COUNT by severity (SQL) + QA policy document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: How many trial accounts are currently active, what does the product pitch deck describe about key value propositions, and what percentage of trials converted to paid plans last quarter?
test_cases.description: Three intents: active trial COUNT (SQL), pitch deck document lookup (text), conversion rate (SQL). Tests 3-way split in a SaaS context.

test_cases.query: What is the average cost per hire for each department this year and what does the talent acquisition policy document say about constraints on using external recruiting agencies?
test_cases.description: AVG cost-per-hire by department (SQL) + talent acquisition policy document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What is the average uptime percentage per server cluster over the last quarter and what does the disaster recovery plan describe about RTO and RPO targets?
test_cases.description: AVG uptime by cluster (SQL) + disaster recovery plan document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What is the customer acquisition cost broken down by pricing tier and what does the pricing strategy document describe about tier eligibility and positioning?
test_cases.description: CAC by pricing tier (SQL) + pricing strategy document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: How many contracts are up for renewal in the next 90 days, what does the contract renewal procedure document specify about required notice periods, and which accounts are at the highest risk of not renewing?
test_cases.description: Three intents: upcoming renewals COUNT (SQL), renewal procedure document (text), at-risk account ranking (SQL). Tests 3-way split.

test_cases.query: What was the defect rate per production line over the last six months and what does the quality management policy say about mandatory corrective actions when defect rates exceed thresholds?
test_cases.description: Defect rate time-series (SQL) + quality management policy document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: How has social media engagement (likes, shares, comments) trended per platform over the last quarter and what does the social media content strategy document say about optimal posting frequency?
test_cases.description: Engagement trend by platform (SQL) + content strategy document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What is the cross-sell attach rate by product bundle this quarter and what does the sales enablement guide describe about recommended cross-sell conversation scripts?
test_cases.description: Attach rate by bundle (SQL) + sales enablement document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: How many expense reports were flagged as out-of-policy last quarter, what does the expense reimbursement policy document specify about non-compliant submissions, and who were the top five employees by total flagged expense amount?
test_cases.description: Three intents: out-of-policy COUNT (SQL), expense policy document (text), top spenders ranking (SQL). Sensitive HR/finance context.

test_cases.query: How many partner deal registrations were submitted and approved per region last quarter and what does the partner program agreement document say about deal registration exclusivity rules?
test_cases.description: Deal registration COUNT by region (SQL) + partner program agreement document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What is the average number of days to close a deal for each sales representative this year and what does the sales methodology document describe about the stages that typically cause the longest delays?
test_cases.description: AVG days-to-close by rep (SQL) + sales methodology document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What percentage of active users have enabled the new dashboard feature since rollout and what do the release notes describe about the feature's intended use cases and known limitations?
test_cases.description: Feature adoption rate (SQL) + release notes document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: How are customers distributed across bronze, silver, gold, and platinum tiers and what does the loyalty program document specify about the spending thresholds required to qualify for each tier?
test_cases.description: Customer count by loyalty tier (SQL) + loyalty program document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What is our market share by region for the last two fiscal years, what does the competitive intelligence report say about key differentiators versus our top three competitors, and how has quarterly revenue growth compared to overall market growth rates?
test_cases.description: Three intents: market share by region (SQL), competitive intelligence document (text), revenue growth comparison (SQL). Tests 3-way split with wide analytical scope.

test_cases.query: How many SLA breaches occurred per service tier last month and what does the service level agreement document specify about customer credits for each breach category?
test_cases.description: SLA breach COUNT by tier (SQL) + service level agreement document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What is the inventory turnover rate per product category for the last two quarters and what does the supply chain management guide describe about reorder point calculations?
test_cases.description: Inventory turnover rate by category (SQL) + supply chain guide document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: Which API endpoints have the highest error rate over the last 30 days and what does the technical runbook document say about remediation steps for the most common failure modes?
test_cases.description: Error rate ranking by endpoint (SQL) + technical runbook document lookup (text).

test_cases.query: What does the trial-to-paid conversion funnel look like for each pricing plan this quarter, what does the onboarding playbook say about the activation milestones that most strongly predict conversion, and what is the total revenue attributable to trials that converted in the last 90 days?
test_cases.description: Three intents: funnel breakdown by plan (SQL), onboarding playbook document (text), converted-trial revenue (SQL). Tests 3-way split in a growth analytics context.
